creator: gmelis@mikroskosmos.gr
text:
msfconsole fails with the following message:

```
Could not find gem 'ruby_smb (~> 3.2.0)', which is required by gem 'metasploit-framework', in any of the sources.

The source contains the following gems matching 'ruby_smb':
  * ruby_smb-3.1.7
```

The only available version of ruby_smb in the ports is 3.1.7, where metasploit needs version 3.2.0 at least.
